Imports

blockfmt, hexceptions, hdebug_misc, colorstring, introspection, hseq_mapping, hseq_distance

Types

PprintType = object
  head*: string
  parameters*: seq[PprintType]
Simplified representation of generic types 
PprintTreeKind = enum
  ptkIgnored, ptkVisited, ptkConst, ptkTuple, ptkList, ptkMapping, ptkObject,
  ptkNamedTuple
PPrintPath = seq[PPrintPathElem]
PprintTree = object
  path*: PPrintPath
  treeId*: int
  styling* {...}{.requiresinit.}: PrintStyling
  treeType*: PprintType
  size*: int
  height*: int
  forceLayout*: Option[tuple[line, stack: bool]]
  case kind*: PprintTreeKind
  of ptkIgnored, ptkVisited:
      nil

  of ptkConst:
      strVal*: string

  of ptkObject, ptkNamedTuple, ptkTuple, ptkList:
      elements*: seq[tuple[key: string, value: PprintTree]]

  of ptkMapping:
      mappings*: seq[tuple[key, val: PprintTree]]

  
PPrintConf = object
  idCounter: int
  visited: HashSet[int]
  ignorePaths*: PPrintMatch
  forceLayouts*: seq[tuple[match: PPrintMatch, force: PPrintLytChoice]]
  maxStackHeightChoice*: int
  minLineHeightChoice*: int
  minLineSizeChoice*: int
  formatOpts*: LytOptions
  colored*: bool
  sortBySize*: bool
  alignSmallFields*: bool
  alignSmallGrids*: bool

Consts

defaultPPrintConf = (idCounter: 0, visited: (data: [], counter: 0),
                     ignorePaths: (globs: []), forceLayouts: [],
                     maxStackHeightChoice: 5, minLineHeightChoice: 2,
                     minLineSizeChoice: 6, formatOpts: (leftMargin: 0,
    rightMargin: 80, leftMarginCost: 0.05, rightMarginCost: 100.0,
    linebreakCost: 5, indentSpaces: 2, cpack: 0.001,
    format_policy: (breakElementLines: (:anonymous, nil))), colored: true,
                     sortBySize: true, alignSmallFields: true,
                     alignSmallGrids: true)

Procs

proc globKind(pprintGlob: PPrintGlobPart): GenGlobPartKind {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc globKind(pprintGlob: PPrintPathElem): GenGlobPartKind {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc pathElem(kind: PPrintPathKind; name: string): PPrintPathElem {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc pathElem(idx: int): PPrintPathElem {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc newPPrintTree(kind: PprintTreeKind; id: int; path: PPrintPath;
                   conf: PPrintConf; styling: PrintStyling = initPrintStyling()): PprintTree {...}{.
    raises: [ImplementError], tags: [].}
proc newPPrintConst(value, constType: string; id: int; styling: PrintStyling;
                    path: PPrintPath): PprintTree {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc ignoredBy(conf: PPrintConf; path: PPrintPath): bool {...}{.
    raises: [ImplementError], tags: [].}
proc isVisited[T](conf: PPrintConf; obj: T): bool
proc visit[T](conf: var PPrintConf; obj: T)
proc getId[T](conf: var PPrintConf; entry: T; forceCounter: bool = false): int
proc toPprintTree(val: JsonNode; conf: var PPrintConf; path: PPrintPath): PprintTree {...}{.
    raises: [Exception, ValueError, ImplementError], tags: [RootEffect].}
Dedicated pretty-print converter implementation for JsonNode 
proc toPprintTree[T](entry: T; conf: var PPrintConf; path: PPrintPath): PprintTree
proc toPPrintTree[T](obj: T): PprintTree
proc toPPrintBlock(tree: PprintTree; conf: PPrintConf): LytBlock {...}{.
    raises: [ImplementKindError], tags: [].}
proc pptree[T](obj: T; conf: PPrintConf = defaultPPrintConf): PprintTree
proc ppblock[T](obj: T; conf: PPrintConf = defaultPPrintConf): LytBlock
proc pstring[T](obj: T; rightMargin: int = 80;
                force: openArray[(PPrintMatch, PPrintLytChoice)] = @[];
                ignore: PPrintMatch = PPrintMatch();
                conf: PPrintConf = defaultPPrintConf): string
proc pprint[T](obj: T; rightMargin: int = 80;
               force: openArray[(PPrintMatch, PPrintLytChoice)] = @[];
               ignore: PPrintMatch = PPrintMatch();
               conf: PPrintConf = defaultPPrintConf)

Funcs

func pglob(): PPrintGlob {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func star(main: sink PPrintGlob): PPrintGlob {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func field(main: sink PPrintGlob; field: string): PPrintGlob {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
func match(globs: varargs[PPrintGlob]): PPrintMatch {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func matchField(name: varargs[string]): PPrintMatch {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func forceLine(): PPrintLytChoice {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func forceStack(): PPrintLytChoice {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func forceChoice(): PPrintLytChoice {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `$`(part: PPrintGlobPart): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `$`(part: PPrintGlob): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func globEqCmp(path: PPrintPathElem; glob: PPrintGlobPart): bool {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
func matches(match: PPrintMatch; path: PPrintPath): bool {...}{.
    raises: [ImplementError], tags: [].}
func updateCounts(tree: var PprintTree; conf: PPrintConf) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func updateCounts(tree: sink PprintTree; conf: PPrintConf): PprintTree {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
